message.content:
@startuml
participant "Customer" as C
participant "Cashier" as K
participant ":Inventory System" as I
participant ":Order" as O
participant ":Product" as P
participant ":Stock" as S
participant ":Invoice" as Inv
participant ":Transaction" as T

C ..> K :1. Request order product
K ..> C :2. Receive order
K ..> I :3. requestCreateOrder()

I ..> P :3.1 selectProduct()
P ..> S :3.2 checkStock()
S ..> P :3.3 return stock
P ..> I :3.4 return product

alt [F (stock.qty > order.qty)]
    I ..> O :3.5 createOrder(order)
    O ..> S :3.6 updateStock()
    S ..> I :3.7 return update stock
    O ..> Inv :3.8 systemCreateInvoice()
    Inv ..> O :3.9 printInvoice()
    O ..> I :3.10 return invoice
    I ..> K :3.11 return order
    [ELSE]
    I ..> K :3.12 can't create order
    K ..> I :4. response create order status
    I ..> K :5. Invoice
end

@enduml
